title: SoFi Technologies Second Quarter 2024 Earnings: Beats Expectations
text: SoFi Technologies delivered strong second-quarter results that surpassed analyst expectations. The company generated net revenue of $587.0 million (up 21% from Q2 2023) while achieving profitability after previous losses. The fintech firm swung to profitability, posting net income of $7.95 million (up from a $57.6 million loss in Q2 2023). This represented a significant improvement, with the company achieving a profit margin of 1.4%. Earnings per share outperformed significantly, with EPS of $0.008 (up from a $0.062 loss in Q2 2023). The company's bottom line exceeded analyst estimates by 139%, while revenue surpassed expectations by 5.3%. Net interest income of $412.6 million for the second quarter was up 42% year-over-year and up 2% sequentially. Net interest margin of 5.83% was up from 5.74% in the prior-year quarter. For the full year 2024, SoFi now expects to deliver adjusted net revenue of $2.425 billion to $2.465 billion, which implies 17% to 19% annual growth versus 15% to 17% previously. The company continues to expect to add at least 2.3 million new members in 2024, which represents 30% growth. Revenue is forecast to grow 14% per annum on average during the next 3 years.
